description_long: This object is a yellow and black chainsaw with a robust, industrial design, featuring a long metal cutting bar with a toothed chain. The main body is constructed from yellow plastic with black accents, including a prominent black handlebar that wraps around the top and side for secure grip and control. The side of the housing displays vented panels for engine cooling, and there is a visible trigger handle at the rear for operation. The front of the chainsaw includes a safety guard and a chain brake, while the cutting chain appears rugged and suitable for heavy-duty use. The top of the housing has a raised section, likely for access to the engine or maintenance, and a small orange cap is visible, possibly for fuel or oil. The overall build suggests durability and functionality for urban or residential cutting tasks.
description: A yellow and black chainsaw with a long metal cutting bar, wrap-around handle, and visible safety guard, designed for heavy-duty cutting tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cutting bar end, wrap-around handle, and the safety guard directly facing forward.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the cutting bar, vented engine housing, and ergonomic handle design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the handle, engine housing, and the narrow profile of the cutting bar.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the chain, side vents, and the rear trigger handle with orange cap detail.
attribute_handle_design: Two handles: a wrap-around black front handle for multi-position grip and a rear handle with trigger, both designed for ergonomic and secure handling.
attribute_power_source_indicator: Orange cap on the rear handle, likely indicating a gasoline or oil fuel source.
